Latest Trends on fuel transition, shipyard actions, government, ports, financing and industry players. LNG is now leading the way for alternative fuels. There are now 805 LNG-fuelled ships in operation or on order, and 229 more ‘LNG-ready' ships, according to the latest Alternative Fuels Insight from the classification society, DNV.

children.title: Growth to stay low
children.summary: At 914m dwt, the dry bulk fleet has grown by 1.5% so far this year. We have taken a fresh look at our assumptions for supply going forward and outline some of the results below.
